title: Germany and Canada Launch ﾃ｢窶堋ｬ400ﾃ｢竄ｬﾂｯMillion Renewable Hydrogen Auction Consultation
content: The German Ministry for Economic Affairs and Energy (BMWE) launched a public consultation for a ﾃ｢窶堋ｬ400 million bilateral renewable hydrogen auction with Canada. The auction, jointly funded by the German and Canadian governments with ﾃ｢窶堋ｬ200 million each, will support the import of renewable fuels of non-biological origin (RFNBOs), including renewable hydrogen, ammonia, methanol, and other e-fuels, produced in Canada and sold to offtakers in Germany.
author: Analysts Account
